name: The Gunma Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Gunma Bank, Ltd. provides various banking and financial services in Japan. The company is involved in the fund management activities comprising investment in securities and funding in the call market; and accepting deposits and negotiable certificates of deposit, as well as the provision of loans. It also engages in the provision of securities investment, leasing, derivative transaction, and proprietary derivative trading services. The Gunma Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1932 and is based in Maebashi, Japan.
